item.description:
Better Multi-Monitor Support

Maybe you are enjoying Rainaissance on the fancy new Studio Display. If you are me, you are not. Either way, if you plug/unplug a new monitor while Rainaissance is running, it will not restart (previous behavior to handle screen changes). Now, it just handles the reconcilation automatically. This means your Rain sound won't stop/start and you don't have to worry about Rainaissance disappearing, because that would be truly awful.

Also, in case you didn't see it previously, I'm excited to say that Raycast approved the extension for Rainaissance!🎉 You can install by clicking here or by searching for "Rainaissance" the the Raycast extension store. I also recommend checking out the available Shortcuts in the Apple Shortcuts app if you like to automate things.
